problem_title: Travel Rule messages remain siloed across providers
problem_description: VASPs face delays and gaps when Travel Rule data and exception handling stay separated across disconnected systems. This fragmentation undermines case workflows, slows compliance review and weakens audit evidence for regulatory scrutiny.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY integrates originator and beneficiary data, message status, exceptions, and case management into a unified workflow that streamlines review and preserves audit evidence for Travel Rule operations.
workflow_title: From Travel Rule message to case review
workflow_description: SFTY routes Travel Rule messages through status tracking and exception handling into structured cases, evidence preservation and compliance review workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit

why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for Travel Rule compliance?
faq_1_answer: SFTY connects Travel Rule messages, originator and beneficiary data, exception handling, cases and audit evidence into one structured compliance workflow for regulated digital asset businesses.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle OpenVASP message routing?
faq_2_answer: SFTY routes OpenVASP messages within a controlled workflow, tracking status and exceptions while linking customer and wallet data for comprehensive compliance review and case management.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve Travel Rule evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision logs, case history and supporting evidence for all Travel Rule events to support audit readiness and regulatory inspection preparation.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing Travel Rule providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY works above existing Travel Rule providers, integrating their outputs into a connected compliance layer without disrupting your current provider relationships.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace Travel Rule providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY does not replace Travel Rule providers but connects their outputs into structured workflows, evidence packages and cases for better compliance operations.
final_title: Structure Travel Rule workflows with OpenVASP integration
